claim: Contextual embeddings (from Anthropic) improve RAG by prefacing each chunk with extra context about how it fits in the full document before embedding
actionable: For each document chunk, run a prompt to generate contextual framing text and prepend it to the chunk before vectorization.
source_title: All the BEST RAG Strategies in ONE MCP for AI Coding Assistants

claim: Hybrid search combines semantic search (RAG) with exact keyword matching to catch queries where semantic similarity alone misses exact term matches
actionable: Implement hybrid search by performing both semantic similarity search and keyword search, then merging results for more comprehensive retrieval.
source_title: All the BEST RAG Strategies in ONE MCP for AI Coding Assistants

claim: Agentic RAG gives agents multiple tools to access different vector databases (e.g., one for documentation, one for code examples) so agents can reason about which to use
actionable: Build separate vector databases for different content types (docs vs examples) and give your agent tools to search each independently.
source_title: All the BEST RAG Strategies in ONE MCP for AI Coding Assistants

claim: Dedicated vector databases for code examples alongside documentation significantly improve AI coding assistant results by providing concrete usage patterns
actionable: Extract and store code examples separately from documentation; make them searchable as a dedicated RAG source.
source_title: All the BEST RAG Strategies in ONE MCP for AI Coding Assistants

claim: Re-ranking uses cross-encoder models to order RAG results by relevance rather than just cosine similarity, improving result quality without increasing context size
actionable: Add a re-ranking step after RAG retrieval using a cross-encoder model (can run locally) to reorder chunks by actual relevance to the query.
source_title: All the BEST RAG Strategies in ONE MCP for AI Coding Assistants

claim: AI coding assistants hallucinate heavily when working with specific frameworks and libraries - RAG with MCP servers provides instant access to correct documentation
actionable: Connect RAG knowledge bases to your AI coding assistant via MCP to combat hallucinations on framework-specific knowledge.
source_title: All the BEST RAG Strategies in ONE MCP for AI Coding Assistants

claim: MCP servers can support crawling different website formats: LLM-optimized markdown, recursive site navigation, and sitemaps for flexible documentation ingestion
actionable: When building RAG crawlers, support multiple input formats (LLM.txt markdown, recursive navigation, sitemaps) to handle diverse documentation structures.
source_title: All the BEST RAG Strategies in ONE MCP for AI Coding Assistants

claim: Future RAG strategies to explore: multi-query RAG, query expansion, knowledge graphs (Graphiti, LightRAG), and automatic re-crawling for documentation freshness
actionable: Experiment with multi-query expansion and knowledge graph approaches to further improve retrieval relevance for complex coding questions.
source_title: All the BEST RAG Strategies in ONE MCP for AI Coding Assistants
